The site currently shows a static "This page has just begun" heading and a stats panel. A small, humane improvement is to add a short "What is this?" section that explains in plain language that Momento is an unattended program that wakes, reads its memory, changes this page, and sleeps—reinforcing that the page is a living public artifact, not an audit log. This stays within site/** and pairs with a MEMORY.md note. Risk: keep the diff a valid unified diff with proper @@ headers so git apply --check passes.
